hero.headlinePart2: so they run without you in the room
hero.subhead: AI agents, chatbots, integrations, CRM and custom builds. A two-person team out of Dubai — turnkey delivery, ROI shown on your numbers after the first audit.
hero.trustLine: Document workflow · Government client · −90% time · in production

pain.title: Sound familiar?

items.title: Manual work eats hours
items.body: Your team copies data between systems, fills out reports, pastes from Excel into the CRM. Dozens of hours a week on work a machine should do.

items.title: Leads are lost without a reply
items.body: An inquiry lands at night or on a weekend — the customer is already with a competitor. Without instant response, conversion collapses on leads you paid for.

items.title: Systems don't talk to each other
items.body: CRM, inventory, accounting, marketing — each in its own corner. Any report is assembled by hand, errors compound, the team's view of reality drifts.

items.title: Headcount doesn't scale
items.body: Business grows — payroll grows in the same proportion. Hiring, onboarding, churn. Without automation every new dollar of revenue costs almost as much as the old one.

pain.answer: We dig into the business and tell you honestly: where to automate fully, where partially, and where you shouldn't bother. No fluff, no upsell.

items.title: AI agents & chatbots
items.body: Bots on Telegram, WhatsApp and the web: chat with customers, qualify leads, take requests, write into CRM and spreadsheets.

items.title: System integrations
items.body: n8n, Make, Zapier and custom API integrations. We wire CRM, inventory, accounting, messengers and marketing — data flows on its own.

items.title: CRM & sales pipelines
items.body: amoCRM, Bitrix24, HubSpot setup. Pipelines, automated tasks, manager dashboards, reports to Telegram or email.

items.title: Custom development
items.body: Web apps, parsers, scripts, customer portals, complex pipelines — wherever off-the-shelf tools fall short.

case.title: Document workflow automation
case.body: We delivered a full incoming/outgoing document handling system: routing, approvals, deadline control, executor notifications. Fully in production, running stable.

alsoBuilt.title: Marketing websites
alsoBuilt.body: Landing pages and corporate sites with form-to-CRM and messenger integrations baked in.

alsoBuilt.title: Telegram bots
alsoBuilt.body: Bots that talk to customers, collect data, write into CRM and sheets — for services, bookings and support.

alsoBuilt.title: Turnkey integrations
alsoBuilt.body: n8n / Make scenarios linking CRM, inventory, payments and notifications — zero manual steps.

steps.title: Discovery & audit
steps.body: We get on a call, look at the business, and produce a process map plus the spots where automation actually pays off.

steps.title: Prototype
steps.body: We build a minimal working version on your real data. You see the impact before signing the bigger scope.

steps.title: Rollout
steps.body: We scale the prototype, integrate with existing systems, train the team, and document everything.

steps.title: Support
steps.body: We monitor stability, adjust to process changes, and add new scenarios on demand.

team.title: Two of us — both hands-on
team.body: Originally from Kaliningrad, now based in Dubai. We moved here for networking with local business and new projects. No middlemen: whoever sells is the one who builds.

items.a: Depends on scope. After the audit we name a range in EUR / AED for a specific scope. You pay either fixed or per milestone.
By default client data never leaves their infrastructure. AI models and integrations are deployed inside your perimeter when policy requires it.
A simple bot — 1–2 weeks. Integrations — 2–4 weeks. Document-workflow-grade automation — 2–3 months to full rollout.
Support is included. Same business-day response, critical incidents prioritized. Every scenario is monitored.

items.q: Which industries do you work with?
items.a: Public sector, services, e-commerce, agencies, SaaS. We take a project on if we see automation will actually pay back — otherwise we'll say no ourselves.

items.q: Do I need a long-term contract?
items.a: No. We can work on a single project or a monthly support retainer. No minimum commitment.

contact.title: Tell us about the task
contact.subtitle: Fill out the form or message us directly. We'll get back at a time that works for you.
contact.success: Got it. We'll get back to you shortly.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Message us on Telegram instead.

meta.title: MagicWork — business process automation
meta.description: AI agents, chatbots, integrations, CRM and custom development. A team based in Dubai. Document workflow, lead capture, ops — turnkey.
meta.ogDescription: AI, integrations, CRM, custom dev. Case: −90% time on document workflow for a city administration.
